after_946_frame_burst.note: detector absorbed and drained the burst back to zero lag

idle_unconsumed_group_growth.note: standalone aggregator not running; its committed offset is static so backlog accumulates in the broker, bounded by topic retention -- the buffering that absorbs backpressure

producer_upload_ceiling_observed.note: on this link the fat base64 frame upload, not detector inference, was the first bottleneck under a flat-out burst
